Title: Gekijouban Sekaiichi hatsukoi: Yokozawa Takafumi no baai
Writer: Miyako Fujisaki, Chiaki Kon, Shungiku Nakamura
Actors: Tôru Furuya, Yui Horie, Ken'yû Horiuchi
Plot: Yokozawa meets a man (Kirishima) and his life is turned around. Kirishima starts to blackmail and tease Yokozawa, but Kirishima might actually be trying to help him recover from an emotional period of his life in the process.
